title: Iflaky Italian Herbs Pasta
description: A herbal, flaky pasta dish that's a crowd-pleaser and suitable for jain-friendly diets. Capers add a briny flavor that complements the dish well.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add capers and garlic; sauté for about 1 minute until softened.
If using red wine, pour it into the pan with the garlic and capers. Let simmer for another 2 minutes or until slightly reduced.
Cook pasta according to package directions in boiling water until al dente.
Drain pasta and return half of it back into the cooking pan with oil and ingredients.
Add remaining pasta to the mixture, tossing gently.
Taste and add more salt if needed. Garnish with pepper before serving.
